_comment: Content blueprint for the LISRAYA email

content_blueprint.rationale: Opens with the core positioning line
content_blueprint.copy_outline: LISRAYA is the first and only FDA-approved targeted treatment for adults with dermatomyositis.
content_blueprint.design_concept: Warm arrival — the 'getting back to themselves' promise stated with quiet confidence, not a launch shout. The lakeside couple-and-dog hero (f1710691) runs full-bleed edge-to-edge across the 600px masthead, cropped into the brand Accent shape with the large 120px radius on top-left + bottom-right and the 6px near-point on the opposite diagonal so it reads modern and optimistic rather than a plain photo rectangle; its baked-in 'NOW APPROVED' flag already rides the top-right corner, so no extra badge is added. A single translucent Sky Blue wave (Sky Blue #358CCB over Deep Blue #003D74 at 70% transparency, short variant) tucks along the seam where the photo meets the copy to carry the eye downward. Below, a calm White #ffffff surface (24px side insets, 32px top/bottom) holds the positioning line: headline-weight statement in Nunito Sans ExtraBold, Title Case, Brand Blue #00529b at H1 display scale with LISRAYA® as the focal first/most-prominent mention; the qualifying clause drops to H3 Nunito Sans SemiBold so 'first and only FDA-approved targeted treatment' lands as the second beat, and dermatomyositis (DM) is established here in full at first mention. A thin 2px Gold #ffc60a rule sits beneath the line as the brand's signature underscore. Airy and premium — generous white space, one focal photo, one headline, deliberately unhurried to set the tone its denser neighbors will play against.

visuals.name: Hero_header1_nowapproved.png
visuals.description: [PHOTO] A wide, panoramic color photograph of a middle-aged couple walking a medium-sized, curly-fur dog along a lakeside trail at sunset or early evening. The woman, in the foreground, has blonde hair tucked under a navy baseball cap, wear

content_blueprint.clinical_fact_covered: First and only FDA-approved targeted treatment for adult DM

content_blueprint.rationale: Conveys mechanism and benefit bullets verbatim
content_blueprint.copy_outline:
LISRAYA blocks inflammatory signals that drive dermatomyositis, so you can:

• Increase your muscle strength
• Improve your skin symptoms
• Rely less on steroids
• Do more of the activities you love
content_blueprint.design_concept: Mechanism-to-life payoff — turn the 'blocks inflammatory signals' science into four felt, scannable wins. Background shifts to Light Blue #E6F0F9 at full strength to separate cleanly from the White intro above; 24px insets, 32px top/bottom. The MOA lead-in sits up top in Nunito Sans Bold, Brand Blue #00529b at H2 scale (LISRAYA bolded as the focal brand mention, first instance), body context in Nunito Sans Regular 16px/24px Graphite #212121. The four benefits become a hairline-divided editorial list, NOT a card grid: each row is a single 1px Sky Blue #358CCB hairline-separated band pairing a minimal circular line icon (Brand Blue stroke on the Light Blue field) at ~40px left with its benefit phrase in Nunito Sans SemiBold Graphite — the running-shoe icon (ef270eef) anchors 'Increase your muscle strength', the torso/rash icon (25634bd1) sits with 'Improve your skin symptoms', and the stacked-bars-with-downward-chevron icon (56b4d990) carries 'Rely less on steroids'; the fourth line, 'Do more of the activities you love', is intentionally given no icon and is instead embodied by the closing image. The Yoga banner (88621570) seals the section as a full-width Accent-shape strip (large 120px radius top-left + bottom-right) — warm, real, lifestyle, 'show don't tell'. Denser and more rhythmic than the intro: tight icon-to-text pairings stacked in steady cadence, then released by the wide photo, so the section reads as proof you can scan in five seconds.

visuals.description: [PHOTO] Two mature women practice an outdoor exercise stretch in a sunlit park setting. In the foreground, an African-American woman with salt-and-pepper hair pulled into a high puff smiles as she extends her right arm forward in a yoga-lik

content_blueprint.clinical_fact_covered: LISRAYA blocks inflammatory signals driving dermatomyositis

content_blueprint.rationale: Delivers dosing convenience callout and safety note
content_blueprint.copy_outline:
LISRAYA is a once-daily pill—you can take it at home with no infusions or shots needed.

LISRAYA may cause side effects
content_blueprint.design_concept: Convenience as relief — once-daily simplicity, no shots, framed as something that fits a life. Background returns to White #ffffff so the section breathes against the Light Blue benefits above and so the Icon Callout Box reads at full contrast. The dosing message is delivered through the brand's signature Icon Callout Box: a Light Blue #E6F0F9 accent-shape box (border-radius 40px 8px 40px 8px) inset from the left, copy in Nunito Sans ExtraBold ~21px/28px Brand Blue #00529b, with the white rounded-square badge (mirrored radius 20px 4px 20px 4px, Dark Navy #011E45 drop shadow at low opacity) straddling the box's left edge 50/50 and holding the '1x' once-daily pill icon (bc743a3f) in Brand Blue stroke — the badge is the single focal beat, lifting off the box to make 'once-daily' feel tangible. Beneath, the safety note 'LISRAYA may cause side effects' sits in a calm, plainly legible Golden Sand #FEF1C8 (30% tint) text panel, Nunito Sans Regular 16px/24px Graphite #212121, clearly set apart with 24px padding and a quiet tone — no alarm, no red, supportive per brand data-tone rules. Medium density: one strong device, one calm note, pacing that decompresses after the benefit list and hands off cleanly to the CTA.
content_blueprint.section_summary: Once-daily callout and side effect note

icons.name: Icon_dosing.png
icons.description: [ICON] A flat, two-tone blue line-art icon depicting a single oblong pill at its center, with a short straight score line etched across the tablet’s midpoint. Encircling the pill is a partial circular arrow, beginning at the lower left, cur

content_blueprint.clinical_fact_covered: Once-daily oral pill; may cause side effects

content_blueprint.copy_outline: Talk to your doctor about how LISRAYA can help → Button: 'LEARN MORE'
content_blueprint.design_concept: The single, generous close — warm, optimistic, one action. This is the brand's mandated Gradient Callout: the approved Sunshine-to-orange gradient PNG (ddb16771) applied as the full 600px-width background, sized cover/no-repeat/center, with a solid Sunshine #faa31b background-color fallback behind it for Outlook. The headline sits in the top third, horizontally centered, Brand Blue #00529b, Nunito Sans weight 800 at ~28px, one confident line. Below it in the lower-middle, the one signature CTA button: Deep Blue #003D74 fill, White #ffffff label in Nunito Sans 800 ~18px, a Gold #FFC20E '›' arrow trailing after two non-breaking spaces, sized 248×64px, and the mandatory four-value asymmetric radius 49.52px 1.76px 40px 1.76px exactly — never simplified. No photo, no icon, no wave competes; the warmth of the gold field does all the work. Airy and singular by design — the most saturated, most focused moment in the email, a deliberate exhale of color after the cooler blue-and-white sections, leaving one unmistakable thing to do.

visuals.name: Gradient_callout.png
visuals.description: [OTHER] Solid horizontal gradient background transitioning from bright yellow on the left to deep orange on the right with a smooth color blend. No additional visual elements or text present.
